title: Electronic Component Parts & Engineered Solutions
note: Primary company product page describing TE's broad portfolio of connectors, sensors, relays, wire protection, and related electronic components.

title: Annual Reports
note: Investor-relations index for TE Connectivity annual reports, including the 2025 annual report.

note: Annual report source for company business description, segment context, risk factors, and financial background.

title: TE Connectivity Stock Price & Overview
note: Market data snapshot used for approximate market capitalization and price-to-earnings ratio.

note: Public financial data summary used as a cross-check for FY2025 revenue and net income.

title: KiCad Documentation
note: Technical documentation for the open-source electronics design automation suite used as an enabler for open hardware workflows.

title: Download Libraries
note: Open KiCad library repositories for PCB footprints, symbols, and 3D models.

title: Part-DB
note: Open-source electronic component inventory system that supports KiCad HTTP library workflows.

title: OpenHardware.io
note: Community platform for open-source hardware projects, including sensor and electronics designs.

title: MySensors
note: Free and open-source DIY wireless sensor and actuator network framework.

title: FreeIMU: An Open Hardware Framework for Orientation and Motion Sensing
note: Research paper documenting an open hardware and software framework for motion and orientation sensing.

title: OSE Microfactory Concept
note: Open Source Ecology reference for distributed microfactory concepts relevant to local hardware production.
